text: Claude Code v2.1.122 adds ANTHROPIC_BEDROCK_SERVICE_TIER. flex = 50% off, priority = front of queue, no SDK changes.
Building an MCP server in C# 14 on .NET 11 with the official 1.2 SDK. [McpServerTool], stdio, and the stderr logging fix.
SearchValues<T> in .NET 11: precompute once into a static readonly field, then watch IndexOfAny become 5x to 250x faster across SIMD kernels.
